name: Bernalillo Recreation Center
description: Bernalillo Recreation Center is a place to play pickleball in Bernalillo, NM. There are 4 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Defined Pickleball
description: Defined Pickleball is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Rio Rancho, NM. There are 18 indoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are available. A membership is required to play. Amenities include food, locker rooms, restrooms, water, lights, a pro shop or equipment store, and trainers or lessons.

name: Haynes Park
description: Haynes Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Rio Rancho, NM. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. Reservations are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Lomas Encantadas Park
description: Lomas Encantadas Park is a place to play pickleball in Rio Rancho, NM. There is 1 outdoor hard and concrete court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. You can’t reserve the court. The court is free. Players have access to water.

name: Premier Sports Multiplex
description: Premier Sports Multiplex is a place to play pickleball in Corrales, NM. There are 8 indoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms. The courts can be reserved. A membership is required to play.

name: Rio Rancho Sports Complex
description: Rio Rancho Sports Complex is a place to play pickleball in Rio Rancho, NM. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. You can’t reserve the courts. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights.

name: The HUB, Community Center
description: Come play pickleball at The HUB, Community Center in Rio Rancho, NM! There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility. Reservations are available. The courts are free.

name: The McDermott Athletic Center
description: Come play pickleball at The McDermott Athletic Center in Rio Rancho, NM! There are 6 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights. A membership is required to play.
